stemHtml: A twin-engine aircraft at 3000 ft loses one engine but can safely climb on the remaining engine. Current mass is 5900 kg, MLM is 5600 kg. What should the pilot do?

options.a: Climb slowly to 6000 ft and then proceed to dump fuel.
options.b: Remain at 3000 ft and dump fuel away from towns and cities.
options.c: Remain at 3000 ft and dump fuel away from thunderstorms.
options.d: Remain at 3000 ft and dump fuel over a body of water.
